lane_stats.seasonality_notes: Winter weather impacts Dec-Feb. Agricultural peaks Jul-Oct.

Actual rates depend on freight details, accessorials, and current market conditions.

faq_seeds.q: How long does LTL freight take from Chicago to Atlanta?
faq_seeds.a: Estimated transit is 3-4 business days on this ~695-mile lane. Actual times depend on carrier routing and weather.

faq_seeds.q: How much does LTL shipping from Chicago to Atlanta cost?
faq_seeds.a: Modeled LTL rates range from $3,102 to $4,135 depending on freight details. Get an instant quote for real-time pricing.

faq_seeds.q: What equipment is available on the Chicago to Atlanta lane?
faq_seeds.a: Common equipment includes Dry Van, Reefer (temp-controlled). Availability varies by season and demand.

faq_seeds.q: Can we start with just this lane before expanding?
faq_seeds.a: Yes. A single-lane pilot lets you validate performance before committing to additional corridors.

faq_seeds.q: How does WARP handle exceptions on this LTL lane?
faq_seeds.a: WARP detects exceptions automatically with alerts within 30 minutes of any status change.
